title: Mossel Bay welcomes one New Year's baby
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  A very excited Leticia Fourie (20) gave birth to the only New Year's baby in Mossel Bay yesterday, 1 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A very excited Leticia Fourie (20) gave birth to the only New Year's baby in Mossel Bay yesterday, 1 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Fourie welcomed her little bundle of joy, Charlotte Kruger at 17:33 at the Mossel Bay Provincial hospital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said she had known she would be giving birth on 1 January and while she had been excited, she was also nervous when her water broke.","html":"She said she had known she would be giving birth on 1 January and while she had been excited, she was also nervous when her water broke."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When asked how she felt about Charlotte being born on New Year's Day, she said: \"It feels like the whole world is celebrating with the family,\".","html":"When asked how she felt about Charlotte being born on New Year's Day, she said: \"It feels like the whole world is celebrating with the family,\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Charlotte is one of 132 babies born at public health facilities across the Western Cape yesterday. Last year, there were no babies born on New Year's Day in Mossel Bay.","html":"Charlotte is one of 132 babies born at public health facilities across the Western Cape yesterday. Last year, there were no babies born on New Year's Day in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Department of Health and Wellness said that from 00:00 on 1 January, \"66 boys and 66 girls were safely delivered, bringing joy to families and communities across the province,\".","html":"The Western Cape Department of Health and Wellness said that from 00:00 on 1 January, \"66 boys and 66 girls were safely delivered, bringing joy to families and communities across the province,\"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It said the first baby of the year, a baby boy, was born at Mowbray Maternity Hospital at 00:00, weighing 3.8 kg, to proud mother Geneva Claasen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Shortly after, at 00:03, a baby boy was born at Paarl Hospital, weighing 3.5 kg. Third was a baby girl, born at Stellenbosch Hospital at 01:38, weighing 3.2 kg,\" said the department.","html":"\"Shortly after, at 00:03, a baby boy was born at Paarl Hospital, weighing 3.5 kg. Third was a baby girl, born at Stellenbosch Hospital at 01:38, weighing 3.2 kg,\" said the department."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The department congratulated all parents and caregivers on the safe deliveries of their babies and extended a thank you to all the healthcare workers, especially midwives, \"who sacrificed time with their own families to provide exceptional care to others on this special day,\" the department said.","html":"The department congratulated all parents and caregivers on the safe deliveries of their babies and extended a thank you to all the healthcare workers, especially midwives, \"who sacrificed time with their own families to provide exceptional care to others on this special day,\" the department said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"As we embrace a new year filled with possibility, let’s commit to giving our children the best possible beginning. Together, we can help every family and new life start well,\" it said.","html":"\"As we embrace a new year filled with possibility, let’s commit to giving our children the best possible beginning. Together, we can help every family and new life start well,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay welcomes one New Year's baby
